name: open-microchip-tools
description: Repo-local VS Code commands for PICkit 4/ICD4 probing and firmware simulator debugging.

commands.title: Open Microchip Tools: List Known Devices

Open Microchip Tools: Set Hardware PC
Open Microchip Tools: Run Hardware Target
Open Microchip Tools: Step Hardware Target
Open Microchip Tools: Halt Hardware Target

Open Microchip Tools: Start Simulator Session

openMicrochipTools.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to launch the repo-local backend server.

openMicrochipTools.pickit4Vid.description: USB vendor ID used when probing PICkit 4.

openMicrochipTools.pickit4Pid.description: USB product ID used when probing PICkit 4. Set this to your actual device PID.

openMicrochipTools.icd4Vid.description: USB vendor ID used when probing ICD4.

openMicrochipTools.icd4Pid.description: USB product ID used when probing ICD4. Set this to your actual device PID.

openMicrochipTools.statusKeys.description: RI4 status keys to read from the attached tool.

openMicrochipTools.hardwareProcessor.description: Processor selector used when loading repo-local scripts.xml content for a hardware session.

openMicrochipTools.hardwareFamily.description: Optional RI4 family hint used to select generated script preferences and capability metadata for hardware sessions.

openMicrochipTools.hardwareScriptsPath.description: Path to scripts.xml-compatible content for the selected processor.

openMicrochipTools.hardwareToolScriptsPa.description: Optional path to tool.xml-compatible content for the selected processor.

openMicrochipTools.hardwareScriptSuffix.description: Optional script suffix used when resolving alternate script variants.

openMicrochipTools.hardwarePcBytes.description: Byte width used when decoding GetPC responses for hardware sessions.

openMicrochipTools.zephyrStubFamily.description: Default family used by the Zephyr stub demo panel.

openMicrochipTools.zephyrStubProcessor.description: Default processor used by the Zephyr stub demo panel.

openMicrochipTools.zephyrStubWriteAddres.description: Default write address used by the Zephyr stub demo panel.

openMicrochipTools.zephyrStubWriteHex.description: Default hex payload used by the Zephyr stub demo panel.

openMicrochipTools.defaultDevice.description: Default device for repo-local simulator sessions.

openMicrochipTools.simulatorMaxSteps.description: Default instruction budget when running the simulator from the extension.
